message: Node started: Implement the main.py script based on the strategy provided. The script must: 1. Read N and the N lines of xi, yi, ri from stdin. 2. Implement the non-overlapping rectangle generation logic. 3. Ensure all rectangles are within [0, 10000) x [0, 10000). 4. Ensure each rectangle i contains (xi, yi). 5. Print exactly N lines of x1 y1 x2 y2. Use a simple, reliable method like a greedy expansion or a recursive subdivision to guarantee no overlaps.
